description.value: > General Feats > Evidence Forger You don’t care about truth; you care only that the âfactsâ support your agenda, and you are adept at making such falsehoods seem true. Prerequisites: Manifestation level 3rd, evidence eraser*. Gift: When attempting a Linguistics or similar check to create a forged piece of evidence, you can roll twice and use the higher result. You can use this gift a number of times per week equal to your manifestation level. Stain: You can no longer discern between reality and a plausible lie. Whenever you attempt either a Will saving throw to disbelieve an illusion or an opposed Sense Motive check, you roll twice and take the lower result.
